channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: States Propose Holding Oil Companies Accountable for Rising Property Insurance Costs
item.description: As property insurance premiums soar due to increasing natural disasters, some U.S. states are exploring legislation to hold oil companies responsible for climate-related damages. In California, Hawaii...

item.title: MV Hondius to dock in Rotterdam; 27 crew and medical staff to undergo quarantine
item.description: The MV Hondius, a luxury cruise ship flagged in the Netherlands, is set to dock in Rotterdam following an outbreak of hantavirus on board. Dutch authorities have arranged quarantine facilities for the...

item.title: Senate Ends Session Without Leadership Revamp and Appoints New Committee Chairpersons
item.description: The Philippine Senate adjourned its session on Monday without any changes in its leadership despite earlier rumors of a possible coup or revamp. Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano firmly dismissed t...

item.title: Granit Xhaka praises Dr Danny Tong for empowering African youth through mentorship
item.description: Swiss footballer Granit Xhaka has publicly expressed his admiration for South African businessman Dr Danny Tong, highlighting Tong’s significant contributions to youth mentorship across Africa. In a v...

item.title: Tanzania Misses World Cup 2026; Analysis of Opponents' Chances
item.description: Tanzania didn’t manage to qualify for World Cup 2026, finishing third in CAF Group E behind Morocco and Niger. Only Morocco went through for the big tournament in North America. Tanzanian fans goin mi...

item.title: Paul Onuachu Wins 2025/2026 Turkish Süper Lig Top Scorer Award
item.description: Nigerian striker Paul Onuachu finish as top scorer for the 2025/2026 Turkish Süper Lig season, collecting 22 goals for Trabzonspor and edging out Victor Osimhen in the race. Onuachu's consistency and ...

item.title: Agriculture Secretary Faces Backlash for Promoting Beef Exports to China Amid U.S. Price Surge
item.description: U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins faced significant criticism from MAGA-aligned figures after announcing new commitments from China to import American beef. Rollins celebrated the resumptio...

item.title: Research Shows Water Tankering Delays Infrastructure Fixes and Fuels Corruption in South African Municipalities
item.description: A recent study reveals that water tankers, once meant as a temporary measure for shortages, have become a permanent fixture in many South African towns and cities. Instead of fixing ageing pipes, leak...

item.title: Princess Charlotte Expected to Become Princess Royal Following Princess Anne
item.description: Princess Charlotte, the 11-year-old daughter of the Prince and Princess of Wales, is anticipated to be granted the prestigious Princess Royal title in the future, following the example of Princess Ann...

item.title: A Decade Later: Unsolved Case of North York Teen Remains Unresolved
item.description: It has been ten years since investigators reported a significant development in one of Canada’s most infamous unsolved murders, the disappearance of a 14-year-old girl from North York. Despite the bre...

item.title: Families face uncertainty due to changes in testamentary trust rules
item.description: Thousands of Australian families and small business owners are facing financial and legal uncertainty following recent federal budget changes affecting discretionary testamentary trusts. These reforms...

item.title: US Waives Visa Deposits for Certain African Fans Ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: The United States has announced a partial easing of visa requirements for football fans from five African countries ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Supporters from Algeria, Cape Verde, Ivory Coast, ...

item.title: Two policemen killed while escorting polio vaccination teams in Bajaur
item.description: In Bajaur district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, two policemen lost their lives in separate attacks while providing security to polio vaccination teams on the first day of a four-day anti-polio campaign. The...

item.title: KEHPHPU raises alarm over unqualified staff managing Nairobi Food Certification Unit
item.description: The Kenya Environmental Health and Public Health Practitioners’ Union (KEHPHPU) has raised serious concerns over the management of the Food Hygiene and Medical Certification Unit at Nairobi City Hall....

item.title: Over 3,000 Runners Take Part in Absa Dar City Marathon Supporting Healthcare
item.description: Dar es Salaam hosted the 2026 Absa Dar City Marathon yesterday, drawing more than 3,000 runners from across Tanzania. Sponsored by Absa Bank Tanzania, the event featured 5km, 10km, and 21km races, att...

item.title: Peel police rescue 57 kittens and 8 cats, arrest man on multiple animal cruelty charges
item.description: Peel Regional Police, in cooperation with Animal Welfare Services, rescued 57 kittens and eight cats following an investigation into alleged animal cruelty. The investigation began after Animal Welfar...

item.title: IFP Expels Sipho 'Es' Mbatha Over Alleged Extortion
item.description: The Inkatha Freedom Party (IFP) has officially expelled Mr Sipho 'Es' Mbatha, formerly a councillor in the King Cetshwayo District Municipality, following allegations of misconduct. According to the I...

item.title: A Retrospective of the UK’s Most Unsuccessful Eurovision Entries
item.description: The United Kingdom has endured a challenging history in the Eurovision Song Contest, with numerous entries failing to capture the audience's favour. The most recent humiliation occurred in 2026 when L...

item.title: Federal High Court Grants Bail to Former Kaduna Governor El-Rufai with Strict Conditions
item.description: Federal High Court for Abuja don grant bail to Malam Nasir El-Rufai, wey be former Kaduna State governor. The court fix the bail at N100 million plus one surety wey gots to be equal in value. Justice ...

item.title: Hai District gets new tower to improve mobile network coverage
item.description: Hai District in Tanzania has finally overcome its long-standing communication difficulties thanks to the construction of a new telecommunication tower. Residents of the district had been facing challe...
